newsQueries.label: 国内风电行业动态
newsQueries.query: 风电 (项目 OR 中标 OR 交付 OR 投产 OR 订单 OR 合作 OR 海上风电 OR 大容量)

newsQueries.label: 国内疲劳断裂仿真
newsQueries.query: (疲劳 OR 断裂 OR 裂纹扩展) (仿真 OR 有限元 OR 寿命预测 OR S-N OR 损伤容限)

newsQueries.label: 国内AI动态
newsQueries.query: (人工智能 OR 机器学习 OR 深度学习) (机械 OR 工程 OR 仿真 OR 数字孪生 OR 代理模型 OR 物理信息神经网络)

newsQueries.label: 国内风机噪声研究
newsQueries.query: 风机 (噪声 OR 噪音 OR 气动声学 OR NVH OR 降噪 OR 声压级)

newsQueries.label: 国内风机气动布局研究
newsQueries.query: 风机 (气动 OR 叶片设计 OR 翼型 OR 气弹 OR CFD OR 涡流 OR 尾流)

newsQueries.label: 海外风电行业动态
newsQueries.query: "wind energy" (project OR tender OR installation OR offshore OR turbine OR capacity)

newsQueries.label: 海外疲劳断裂仿真
newsQueries.query: "fatigue" ("wind turbine" OR mechanical OR fracture OR "crack propagation" OR "finite element" OR "life prediction")

newsQueries.label: 海外AI动态
newsQueries.query: "machine learning" ("wind turbine" OR "digital twin" OR "surrogate model" OR "physics-informed" OR "neural network") (simulation OR engineering)

newsQueries.label: 海外风机噪声研究
newsQueries.query: "wind turbine" (noise OR aeroacoustic OR NVH OR "sound pressure" OR "noise reduction")

newsQueries.label: 海外风机气动布局研究
newsQueries.query: "wind turbine" (aerodynamic OR "blade design" OR airfoil OR CFD OR vortex OR wake OR aeroelastic)

researchQueries.label: 疲劳断裂仿真
researchQueries.query: "wind turbine" (fatigue OR fracture OR crack) (blade OR tower OR gearbox OR bearing OR bolt)

researchQueries.label: AI动态建模
researchQueries.query: "wind turbine" ("machine learning" OR "deep learning" OR "digital twin" OR surrogate OR PINN OR "neural network")

researchQueries.label: 风机噪声研究
researchQueries.query: "wind turbine" (noise OR aeroacoustic OR "sound pressure" OR acoustic) (blade OR airfoil OR aerodynamics)

researchQueries.label: 气动布局研究
researchQueries.query: "wind turbine" (aerodynamic OR blade OR airfoil OR wake OR vortex OR CFD OR aeroelastic)

researchQueries.label: 螺栓连接研究
researchQueries.query: "wind turbine" (bolt OR fastener OR connection OR flange OR tension OR preload)

researchQueries.label: 国内风电技术
researchQueries.query: 风机 (疲劳 OR 断裂 OR 叶片 OR 螺栓 OR 噪声 OR 气动 OR AI OR 机器学习)
